body:
This PR cleans up the utils file for the surface flux perfect model experiment by

1. Moving all the imports and `@everywhere` blocks to the top of the file and removing unused imports.
2. Adding docstrings to the testing and plotting functions.
3. Simplifying plotting code such as replacing spread calculation with `Statistics.var`, using CairoMakie instead of Makie, and adding logging for output paths.
4. Relying less on global state by passing arguments to functions

This PR also removed a test that was not removed in an earlier PR https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCalibrate.jl/pull/298 and fix some typos in the `EKPUtils` module.
title: Clean up utils file for surface flux perfect model experiment

body:
closes https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCalibrate.jl/issues/306

There was a chance that the WorkerBackend calibration test could fail because a random seed is not fixed for EKP and the number of iterations is small. This PR fixes this by setting a random seed for EKP.
title: Set random seed for WorkerBackend calibration

body: This PR removes Distributions.jl from the dependencies. I don't think this is used anywhere in ClimaCalibrate.
title: Remove Distributions from dependencies
